overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Fallout 4 showing the player character ascending a stone staircase along a historic castle wall, then walking along a waterfront promenade with views of a post-apocalyptic city skyline, and finally approaching a ruined brick building with a Nuka-Cola vending machine. The scene features clear weather with bright daylight illuminating the detailed game environment.

events.description: reaching the top of the staircase and approaching the statue

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs alongside a tall castle wall, approaching a bronze statue at the summit

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces leading upward alongside the castle wall
tall gray stone fortification wall with weathered blocks and crenellations
tall red and white rocket-shaped tower structure visible in the distance
bronze statue of a colonial figure wearing a tricorn hat positioned at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up a wide stone staircase flanked by a massive gray stone castle wall on the right. The sky is partially visible above, and a distinctive red rocket tower stands in the distant center. As the climb progresses, a bronze statue of a colonial figure becomes visible at the summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking harbor and post-apocalyptic city skyline

events.description: exiting enclosed stairway onto open waterfront promenade with panoramic city views
turning left to follow the waterfront path alongside the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the harbor and distant city skyline

entered.detail: expansive body of water with gentle waves separating the promenade from the urban skyline
post-apocalyptic urban skyline with various building heights and damaged structures
large steel suspension bridge spanning the water in the distance
distinctive cylindrical high-rise building with green-tinted glass facade

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the top of the stairs, the scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade with full sky visibility. The camera turns left to follow the path, revealing a harbor with the Minuteman statue now prominent on the left. Across the water, a post-apocalyptic city skyline features a distinctive green glass building and a large suspension bridge under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined urban street with debris and abandoned building facade

events.description: turning left toward the ruined brick building and away from the waterfront
approaching the bright red Nuka-Cola vending machine against the building wall

agents.ego_description: approaching a ruined building to inspect the vintage Nuka-Cola vending machine

entered.detail: dilapidated multi-story brick building with faded blue-painted trim and broken windows
bright red vintage vending machine with white 'Nuka-Cola' branding and bottle graphic
scattered rubble, trash, and broken concrete along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the waterfront toward a ruined brick building with distinctive blue trim. As the player approaches, a bright red Nuka-Cola vending machine becomes the focal point against the weathered wall. The open skyline and harbor exit the frame, replaced by the enclosed urban decay of the building facade and scattered debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that ascends from a fortified stone wall to an open waterfront before closing in on a site of urban decay. It begins with a climb up a wide stone staircase flanked by a massive gray castle wall, with a distant red rocket tower visible against the sky until a bronze colonial statue appears at the summit. As the camera reaches the top, the view expands into a wide waterfront promenade, turning left to reveal a harbor and a post-apocalyptic city skyline featuring a green glass building and a large suspension bridge under bright daylight. The scene then shifts away from the open harbor and skyline, turning toward a ruined brick building with blue trim. Finally, the perspective narrows as the camera approaches the weathered facade, where a bright red Nuka-Cola vending machine becomes the central focus amidst scattered debris.
